overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk urban environment at night, featuring neon-lit alleyways, futuristic motorcycles, and characters with cybernetic enhancements. The player walks from a covered walkway through city streets and markets, ascending stairs to an upper plaza before entering a desolate parking garage. High-quality game engine rendering with reflective wet surfaces and vibrant neon signage creates a dense atmospheric cityscape.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered concrete walkway with large pillars and graffiti-covered walls. Several futuristic motorcycles are parked along the path, with characters in cyberpunk attire standing nearby. A vending machine is visible on the right side as the camera moves forward through the sheltered space.

The camera turns right and walks along the sidewalk, passing concrete barriers and a metal fence. A pedestrian in a red jacket walks ahead in the same direction, leading toward the alley.

The pedestrian in red continues walking ahead, leading the way toward the stairs while digital billboards line the route.

segments.scene_description: Ascending a wide concrete staircase where characters with cybernetic enhancements and colorful hair are gathered—one sitting on the steps and others standing. At the top, the scene opens into an upper plaza with benches and large digital billboards. The purple-lit building remains visible in the background to the right as the camera moves through the plaza.

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow passage with a glowing manhole cover emitting purple light, then emerging into a covered parking garage or underpass. The area contains abandoned damaged cars, purple vending machines, and large concrete pillars. The environment is dimly lit with artificial lighting and appears completely deserted except for the parked vehicles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban corridor through a vibrant neon district and finally into a desolate industrial underpass. It begins by moving through a covered concrete walkway lined with graffiti and parked futuristic motorcycles, before exiting onto a wet street corner illuminated by a bright green WAGAMI MARKET sign. As the camera turns right and follows a pedestrian in a red jacket, the scene shifts into a narrow alleyway dominated by red neon signage and digital billboards that lead toward a purple-lit glass building. The path then ascends a wide concrete staircase crowded with cybernetically enhanced characters, opening up into an upper plaza filled with benches and large screens. Finally, the camera passes through a narrow passage marked by a glowing purple manhole cover, emerging into a dimly lit, deserted parking garage filled with abandoned cars and concrete pillars.
